Find the number of separate "{target_shape_name}" icon runs in the row.
What is the count of separate consecutive "{target_shape_name}" icon runs?

global.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to a JSON array of [x0, y0, x1, y1] boxes in image pixel coordinates for the icons in the run that determines the answer
global.answer_hint: set "answer" to the run length as an integer

task:shape_run_count.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to a JSON array of [x0, y0, x1, y1] boxes in image pixel coordinates for the first icon in each counted run
task:shape_run_count.answer_hint: set "answer" to the number of separate runs as an integer
